proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011=skin` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other `feature_011` lineages.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_BRAF for feature_009=1 vs feature_009=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in `feature_009=0` lines (n=5574 in subgroup).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_BRAF for feature_011=skin vs all other feature_011 values.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=skin` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.4721 versus -0.2938 in other lineages (n=4935).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_022=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011=brain` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than non-brain cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_022=1` and high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have especially negative `dependency_EGFR` scores compared with the rest of the dataset.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_EGFR for feature_022=1 vs feature_022=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_022=1` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in `feature_022=0` lines (n=3880).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_EGFR for feature_011=brain vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=brain` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.3307 versus -0.2755 in other lineages (n=3565).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_022=1 and feature_016 >= 0.964.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_022=1` and `feature_016 >= 0.964` subgroup had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6253 versus -0.2727 in all other lines (n=964).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_024=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011=breast` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than non-breast cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_024=1` and `feature_010=her2_enriched` have especially negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_ERBB2 for feature_024=1 vs feature_024=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_024=1` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in `feature_024=0` lines (n=4890).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_ERBB2 for feature_011=breast vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=breast` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.3208 versus -0.2916 in non-breast lines (n=7007).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_024=1 and feature_010=her2_enriched.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_024=1` and `feature_010=her2_enriched` subgroup had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.7525 versus -0.2944 in all other lines (n=142).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011=pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_014=1` and `feature_011=pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_KRAS for feature_014=1 vs feature_014=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_014=1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in `feature_014=0` lines (n=11842).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_KRAS for feature_011=pancreatic vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=pancreatic` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.4260 versus -0.3133 in non-pancreatic lines (n=5102).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_014=1 and feature_011=pancreatic.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_014=1` and `feature_011=pancreatic` subgroup had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5591 versus -0.3103 in all other lines (n=2913).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027=0`.
Cell lines with both `feature_011=brain` and `feature_027=1` have especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_027=1` and low `feature_023` (`feature_023 <= 4.230`) have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_RIT1 for feature_027=1 vs feature_027=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_027=1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in `feature_027=0` lines (n=4560).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_011=brain and feature_027=1.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_011=brain` and `feature_027=1` subgroup had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in all other lines (n=329).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_027=1 and feature_023 <= 4.230.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_027=1` and `feature_023 <= 4.230` subgroup had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3761 versus -0.2633 in all other lines (n=1145).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with both high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) and high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) have especially negative `dependency_DHX9` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_POLR2A for feature_016 >= 0.964 vs the rest.
analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in the rest (n=12577).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_TMED10 for feature_016 >= 0.964 vs the rest.
analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2816 versus -0.2447 in the rest (n=12577).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_DHX9 for feature_016 >= 0.964 vs the rest.
analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3614 versus -0.3243 in the rest (n=12577).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_016 >= 0.964 and feature_023 >= 5.669.
analyses.result_summary: The high-`feature_016`, high-`feature_023` subgroup had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in all other lines (n=3320).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_018=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018=0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_003`.
Cell lines with both `feature_018=1` and high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_018=1` and high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have especially negative `dependency_RPL11` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_RPL11 for feature_018=1 vs feature_018=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_018=1` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in `feature_018=0` lines (n=8055).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_RPL11 for feature_003 >= 0.428 vs the rest.
analyses.result_summary: High `feature_003` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3440 versus -0.2452 in the rest (n=12501).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_018=1 and feature_003 >= 0.428.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_018=1`, high-`feature_003` subgroup had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3647 versus -0.2524 in all other lines (n=7797).

analyses.code: Pairwise subgroup contrast for feature_018=1 and feature_016 >= 0.964.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_018=1`, high-`feature_016` subgroup had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.2632 in all other lines (n=2557).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011=colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035=0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_028`.

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_KIF18A for feature_011=colorectal vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=colorectal` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in non-colorectal lines (n=5816).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_KIF18A for feature_035=1 vs feature_035=0.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_035=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.5447 versus -0.2526 in `feature_035=0` lines (n=9285).

analyses.code: Welch contrast of dependency_KIF18A for feature_028 >= 0.819 vs the rest.
analyses.result_summary: High `feature_028` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.4694 versus -0.2526 in the rest (n=12508).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_035=1`, and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have substantially more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

Among colorectal cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`), `dependency_KIF18A` is not more negative when `feature_035=0`, so `feature_035=1` is required for the dependency subgroup.
Among colorectal cell lines with `feature_035=1`, `dependency_KIF18A` is not more negative when `feature_028 < 0.819`, so high `feature_028` is required for the dependency subgroup.

The complete strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_035=1`, high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`), and `feature_020=0`; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Three-predicate subgroup contrast for feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=1, and feature_028 >= 0.819.
analyses.result_summary: The colorectal, `feature_035=1`, high-`feature_028` subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.1119 versus -0.2530 in all other lines (n=3133).

analyses.code: Negative-control subgroup contrast for feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=0, and feature_028 >= 0.819.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines with high `feature_028` but `feature_035=0` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2718 versus -0.3075 in all other lines (n=873), an opposite-signed contrast rather than a dependency signal.

analyses.code: Negative-control subgroup contrast for feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=1, and feature_028 < 0.819.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines with `feature_035=1` but `feature_028 < 0.819` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2727 versus -0.3074 in all other lines (n=792), also opposite-signed rather than more negative.

analyses.code: Four-predicate subgroup contrast for feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=1, feature_028 >= 0.819, and feature_020=0.
analyses.result_summary: Adding `feature_020=0` sharpened the KIF18A signal: the complete subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 in all other lines (n=2571).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic dependency-heterogeneity search across all 10 outcomes identifies these strongest more-negative subgroup contrasts: `dependency_BRAF` in `feature_009=1`; `dependency_EGFR` in `feature_022=1` and `feature_016 >= 0.964`; `dependency_ERBB2` in `feature_024=1` and `feature_010=her2_enriched`; `dependency_KRAS` in `feature_014=1`; `dependency_RIT1` in `feature_011=brain` and `feature_027=1`; `dependency_KIF18A` in `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_035=1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020=0`; `dependency_TMED10` in `feature_011=prostate` and `feature_016 >= 0.964`; `dependency_DHX9` in `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_023 >= 5.669`; `dependency_POLR2A` in `feature_016 >= 0.964`; and `dependency_RPL11` in `feature_018=1` and `feature_016 >= 0.964`.

analyses.code: Screened 88 single feature predicates and all cross-feature predicate pairs for each dependency outcome, then followed the KIF18A pair signal with targeted three- and four-predicate subgroup tests.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_BRAF`, the strongest stable single-predicate subgroup was `feature_009=1`: mean -0.8047 vs -0.2495, effect -0.5552.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_EGFR`, `feature_022=1` with `feature_016 >= 0.964` had mean -0.6253 vs -0.2727, effect -0.3526.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_ERBB2`, `feature_024=1` with `feature_010=her2_enriched` had mean -0.7525 vs -0.2944, effect -0.4581.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_KRAS`, the dominant subgroup remained `feature_014=1`: mean -0.5594 vs -0.2520, effect -0.3075.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_RIT1`, `feature_011=brain` with `feature_027=1` had mean -0.4047 vs -0.2650, effect -0.1397.

analyses.code: Systematic screen plus targeted KIF18A refinement.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_KIF18A`, the final four-predicate subgroup `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_035=1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020=0` had mean -1.2990 vs -0.2530, effect -1.0460.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_TMED10`, `feature_011=prostate` with `feature_016 >= 0.964` had mean -0.3067 vs -0.2533, effect -0.0533.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_DHX9`, high `feature_016` with high `feature_023` had mean -0.3892 vs -0.3297, effect -0.0595.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_POLR2A`, high `feature_016` was the dominant subgroup: mean -0.4972 vs -0.3928, effect -0.1043.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate and pairwise subgroup screen.
analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_RPL11`, `feature_018=1` with high `feature_016` had mean -0.3936 vs -0.2632, effect -0.1303.
